seoTitle: How to Discount a Product on Gumroad Step by Step
metaDescription: Learn how to create and apply a discount on Gumroad, choose between percentage or fixed pricing, and share a ready-to-use discount link.
intro: Running a promotion is a straightforward way to boost sales on Gumroad, and the platform gives you control over how the discount is structured. This guide walks through setting up an offer, choosing between a percentage or fixed-amount reduction, and sharing the resulting link with your audience.

steps.heading: Open the offers and discounts section
steps.body: From your product settings, find the area dedicated to promotional offers.

steps.heading: Create a new offer
steps.body: Start a new discount and assign it to the specific product or products you want to promote.

steps.heading: Choose your discount type
steps.body: Decide between a flat percentage off or a fixed cash reduction, depending on what fits your pricing.

steps.heading: Set limits if needed
steps.body: Add optional limits like maximum redemptions or an expiration date to control the promotion.

steps.heading: Share your discount link
steps.body: Copy the generated link and share it with your audience so they can check out at the reduced price.

faq.question: Can I offer a percentage discount instead of a fixed amount?
faq.answer: Yes, Gumroad lets you choose between a percentage-off or a fixed cash discount when setting up an offer.

faq.question: Can I limit how many people use a discount?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set a maximum number of redemptions and an expiration date on your offer.

faq.question: Do I need a coupon code for buyers to use the discount?
faq.answer: You can generate a direct discount link that applies the price automatically at checkout, without requiring a manual code.

faq.question: Can I run multiple discounts at once?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create separate offers for different products or promotions simultaneously.
